data.title: America's Test Kitchen offers advertising access across its FAST Channel, reaching a food-focused audience - PRNewswire 01/13/26.
data.description: ATK has unveiled a new opportunity for advertisers to connect with a highly engaged, food-oriented audience through brand-safe FAST Channel inventory. The renowned culinary media brand, America's Test Kitchen (ATK), revealed this initiative on January 13, 2026. Widely recognized and trusted by millions, ATK is providing a platform for advertisers to reach a receptive audience.

data.title: California FAIR Plan enrollment increased by 21,859 policies in Q4 of 2025, surpassing total promised under Commissioner Lara's plan.
data.description: In Sacramento, California, on January 13, 2026, the California FAIR Plan revealed updated figures indicating a rise in enrollment, with an increase of 21,859 residential policies during the last quarter of 2025. This surge in enrollment contrasts the actions of six insurance firms that requested premium increases under Insurance regulations.

data.title: Edward Rogers buys minority stake in Toronto Polar Bears, Pro Padel League team. Toronto Polar Bears play in North American PPL.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, Zale Turner, President, CEO, and Founder of the Toronto Polar Bears, disclosed that Edward Rogers has acquired a minority stake in the team. The Toronto Polar Bears are the city's representatives in the North American Pro Padel League (PPL). This recent development marks a significant moment for the team as they continue their journey in the PPL.

data.title: Lease End's revenue grows by 60% in 2025 with $73M savings for drivers, yielding $108M equity.
data.description: A notable increase in revenue has been observed by Lease End, with a remarkable 60% year-over-year growth in 2025. This growth has led to significant benefits, including $73 million in savings and $108 million in equity being unlocked for drivers.

data.title: JFK's New Terminal One seeks aircraft de-icing service provider through RFP.Ensuring safety for all flights.
data.description: In Jamaica, N.Y., on January 13, 2026, the newly built Terminal One at JFK Airport has issued a fresh Request for Proposals (RFP) to source a contractor for aircraft de-icing and de-icing fluid recovery services. Interested service providers meeting the criteria can submit proposals for ensuring the safety of aircraft operations at the terminal.

data.title: New TFX Thermoformer in TAUNTON sets speed/flexibility benchmark for high-volume producers with precision, control, higher output.
data.description: A recent development in Taunton, Massachusetts has introduced a groundbreaking Next-Gen TFX Thermoformer that is revolutionizing the industry. This advanced technology has set a new benchmark by significantly enhancing speed and flexibility for high-volume producers. The Precision Thermoforming capabilities of this innovative equipment provide better control over the production process, resulting in higher output levels. This development marks a significant advancement in the field of automated packaging, with the potential to transform operations for manufacturers.

data.title: Top Wall Street analysts update Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing price expectations ahead of Q4 earnings. They predict earnings of $2.71 per share and revenue of $32.62 billion. Company reported strong results in December-quarter, exceeding market forecasts. Share price is at $331.65.
data.description: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company Limited (TSM) is set to announce its fourth-quarter earnings before the market opens on Thursday, January 15. Analysts are anticipating earnings of $2.71 per share and revenue of $32.62 billion. The company, headquartered in Hsinchu City, Taiwan, recently delivered stronger-than-expected results for both the month and quarter ending in December, surpassing market expectations. Despite this positive performance, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing's shares experienced a slight decline of 0.1% on Tuesday, trading at $331.65. For more details and the complete article, readers can find the full story on Benzinga.com.
